title: lathyrus alpestris subsp. friedrichsthalii
intro: Lathyrus alpestris subsp. friedrichsthalii is a subspecies of flowering plant in the pea family, commonly known as a mountain pea or alpine pea. This plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly for treating respiratory issues such as bronchitis and coughs due to its expectorant and anti-inflammatory effects. The health benefits of Lathyrus alpestris subsp. friedrichsthalii include reducing inflammation, fighting infections, and relieving digestive issues, making it a popular herbal remedy in traditional medicine. Herbal preparations of this plant often involve making teas, infusions, or decoctions from its flowers, leaves, and stems, which can be consumed to harness its medicinal properties.
